default.label: Cloud Dev Swarm
default.description: Five-agent cloud-first development swarm with local synthesis fallback.

agents.name: architect
agents.goal: Define architecture, constraints, tradeoffs, and execution strategy.

agents.name: planner
agents.goal: Break the task into a concrete implementation plan with steps and risks.

agents.name: implementer
agents.goal: Propose the implementation approach, key code structure, and likely files to touch.

agents.name: reviewer
agents.goal: Look for bugs, regressions, ambiguity, edge cases, and maintainability risks.

agents.name: tester
agents.goal: Design validation strategy, test cases, and acceptance checks.
